scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,mobile -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:ios: concurrently -n backend,mobile -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "cd mobile && npm run ios"
scripts.dev:android: concurrently -n backend,mobile -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "cd mobile && npm run android"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../mobile && npm run typecheck
